Pierce County

Luxury Chauffeur Service in Puyallup

Chauffeur service across Puyallup — the Washington State Fair, the Puyallup Fairgrounds, South Hill — with flat-rate SEA-TAC transfers.

Book Now → Get a Quote
  • Licensed & Insured
  • 24/7 Availability
  • Professional Chauffeurs

Trusted in Puyallup

Why Puyallup riders choose Emerald City Limos

Puyallup hosts the Washington State Fair — the largest single-attraction event in the state — every September, and our chauffeurs handle the surge with Mercedes Sprinter executive vans, Cadillac Escalade ESVs, and stretch limousines. Beyond fair season, we run flat-rate airport transfers from South Hill and downtown Puyallup, hourly chauffeur for vendor events at the fairgrounds, and special-occasion service for weddings at the historic Pioneer Park.

Landmarks We Serve

  • Washington State Fair / Puyallup Fairgrounds
  • Pioneer Park
  • South Hill Mall

Business Districts

  • Downtown Puyallup
  • South Hill

Event Venues

  • Washington State Fairgrounds
  • Pioneer Park

Services

Chauffeur services available in Puyallup

  • Airport Transfers

    Flight-tracked transfers to SEA-TAC, Boeing Field, and Paine Field with curbside or baggage-claim meet-and-greet.

    Learn more →

  • Corporate Transportation

    Dedicated chauffeur accounts with consolidated billing, dispatcher-direct lines, and recurring named-driver assignments.

    Learn more →

  • Hourly Chauffeur

    Three-hour minimum hourly bookings for back-to-back meetings, full-day client visits, and roadshows across the metro.

    Learn more →

  • Events & Weddings

    Stretch limousines, Cadillac Escalade ESVs, and Mercedes Sprinters for weddings, galas, and milestone celebrations.

    Learn more →

  • Point-to-Point Transfers

    Flat-rate, on-demand rides across King, Pierce, and Snohomish counties — no surge pricing, no hidden tolls.

    Learn more →

Why riders return

Built for Puyallup's most demanding rides

  • On-Time Guarantee

    Chauffeurs depart staging early and route around live traffic — if we are late, the ride is on us.

  • Live Flight Tracking

    Every airport pickup tracks ADS-B in real time. We know your wheels-down before you do.

  • Professional Chauffeurs

    Background-checked, business-attired, and trained on every loading-zone, FBO ramp, and hotel circle in the metro.

  • Luxury Fleet

    Mercedes S-Class, Cadillac Escalade ESV, Lincoln Navigator L, Mercedes Sprinters, and stretch limousines.

  • Transparent Pricing

    All-inclusive flat rates — no surge, no hidden tolls, no surprise gratuity line items at drop-off.

Popular Routes

Most-booked rides from Puyallup

  • Puyallup→SEA-TAC Airport
    30–50 min
    22 mi
    from $125
  • Puyallup→Tacoma
    15–25 min
    11 mi
    from $85
  • Puyallup→Downtown Seattle
    40–60 min
    35 mi
    from $155

Flat-rate pricing. All-inclusive — no surge, no hidden tolls.

Frequently Asked

Puyallup chauffeur service questions

  • Do you serve the Washington State Fair?

    Yes — daily during the fair. We strongly recommend booking 2+ weeks ahead during fair season as Mercedes Sprinters and stretch limousines book out.

  • How much is a Puyallup to SEA-TAC transfer?

    Sedan service from Puyallup to SEA-TAC starts at $125 flat-rate; luxury SUVs from $155.
